ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mentioned_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mentioned_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL extracted from the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "url")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_keywords" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "keyword")
)
